title: ctenitis exculta
intro: Ctenitis exculta, also known as the silver fern, is a type of fern species native to New Zealand. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis exculta include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ctenitis exculta typically involve infusion of the fronds in hot water to create a tea or tincture that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
